Class ChecklistController

java.lang.Object
ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.ChecklistController
@RestController @RequestMapping("/api/v1/checklists") public class ChecklistController extends Object
REST controller for checklist management and completion.

Provides endpoints for retrieving, creating, completing, and deleting checklists. All endpoints are scoped to the authenticated user's organization. Creating and deleting checklists requires the MANAGER or ADMIN role.

Base path: /api/v1/checklists

    Method
    Description
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void>
    completeItem(Long itemId, User user)
    Marks a specific checklist item as completed by the authenticated user.

    Creates a new checklist for the authenticated user's organization.

    delete(Long id, User user)
    Deletes a checklist by ID.

    Returns a paginated list of checklists for the authenticated user's organization, with optional filtering by module type and frequency.

  • Constructor Details

    • ChecklistController

      public ChecklistController()

  • Method Details

    • getAll

      @GetMapping public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<org.springframework.data.domain.Page<Checklist>> getAll(@AuthenticationPrincipal User user, @RequestParam(defaultValue="0") int page, @RequestParam(defaultValue="6") int size, @RequestParam(required=false) ModuleType module, @RequestParam(required=false) Frequency frequency)
      Returns a paginated list of checklists for the authenticated user's organization, with optional filtering by module type and frequency.
      Parameters:
      user - the authenticated user
      page - the page number to retrieve (zero-indexed, default 0)
      size - the number of items per page (default 6)
      module - optional filter by module type (e.g. KITCHEN, BAR)
      frequency - optional filter by frequency (e.g. DAILY, WEEKLY)
      Returns:
      a paginated list of checklists

    • create

      @PostMapping @PreAuthorize("hasAnyRole('MANAGER', 'ADMIN')") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Checklist> create(@Valid @RequestBody @Valid ChecklistRequest request, @AuthenticationPrincipal User user)
      Creates a new checklist for the authenticated user's organization. Requires the MANAGER or ADMIN role.
      Parameters:
      request - the checklist data including title, description, frequency, and items
      user - the authenticated manager or admin
      Returns:
      the created Checklist

    • completeItem

      @PatchMapping("/{id}/items/{itemId}/complete") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void> completeItem(@PathVariable Long itemId, @AuthenticationPrincipal User user)
      Marks a specific checklist item as completed by the authenticated user.
      Parameters:
      itemId - the ID of the checklist item to complete
      user - the authenticated user
      Returns:
      HTTP 200 on success

    • delete

      @DeleteMapping("/{id}") @PreAuthorize("hasAnyRole('MANAGER', 'ADMIN')") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void> delete(@PathVariable Long id, @AuthenticationPrincipal User user)
      Deletes a checklist by ID. Requires the MANAGER or ADMIN role.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the checklist to delete
      user - the authenticated manager or admin
      Returns:
      HTTP 204 No Content on success
